name: Sangla Chitkul Kalpa Tour Package
overview: Immerse yourself in the breathtaking beauty of the Baspa and Satluj valleys with our 'Sangla Chitkul Kalpa Tour.' This 6-day journey is a deep dive into the heart of Kinnaur, visiting the last inhabited village on the Indo-Tibet border, Chitkul, and the sacred peak views of Kalpa. Perfect for those who seek tranquility, authentic mountain culture, and dramatic landscapes, this package offers a soul-stirring escape into the high Himalayas.
highlights: Comprehensive tour of Kinnaur's most iconic villages
Stay in the lush Sangla Valley, the most beautiful valley in Himachal
Visit Chitkul, the last village on the ancient Hindustan-Tibet trade route
Witness the majestic Kinnaur Kailash peaks from your balcony in Kalpa
Explore the unique wooden architecture of Kamru Fort and Bhimakali Temple
Scenic drives through the rugged Satluj River canyon
Private SUV for safe and comfortable travel on high-altitude roads

itinerary.title: Chandigarh to Shimla/Narkanda - The Ascent Begins
itinerary.description: Meet our representative at Chandigarh and drive toward the hills. Stay overnight in Shimla or Narkanda to acclimatize and enjoy the initial mountain views.

itinerary.title: Narkanda to Sangla - Into the Baspa Valley
itinerary.description: Drive through the dramatic Hindustan-Tibet road along the Satluj River. Enter the Baspa Valley and reach Sangla by evening. Check in to your guest house or riverside camp.

itinerary.title: Chitkul & Sangla Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Chitkul, the last village on the Indo-Tibet border. Enjoy a walk by the Baspa River and visit the local temple. Later, explore the heritage Kamru Fort in Sangla.

itinerary.title: Sangla to Kalpa - Facing the Kailash
itinerary.description: Travel to Kalpa, perched high above the Satluj River. Spend the afternoon witnessing the stunning Kinnaur Kailash peaks. Visit the Roghi village and local Buddhist monasteries.

itinerary.title: Kalpa to Sarahan - The Heritage Stop
itinerary.description: Begin your return journey with a stop at Sarahan. Visit the legendary Bhimakali Temple, a masterpiece of Indo-Tibetan architecture, and enjoy the peaceful surroundings.

itinerary.title: Sarahan to Chandigarh - Final Departure
itinerary.description: Descend back to Chandigarh (270 km, 8-9 hours). Reflect on your Kinnaur memories as our driver drops you at the airport or railway station.

inclusions: Private high-clearance SUV (Innova/Crysta) for the entire tour
5 Nights stay in verified premium guest houses and boutique hotels
Professional driver with specialized Kinnaur route experience
All toll taxes, parking, and state permits included
exclusions: Entry fees to temples and forts

faqs.question: Is the road to Chitkul safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, but the roads are narrow and dramatic. We use experienced mountain drivers and well-maintained SUVs for all our Kinnaur tours.

faqs.question: What kind of clothing should I carry?
faqs.answer: Even in summer, Kinnaur can be cold at night. We recommend carrying heavy woollens for evenings and light layers for the day.
